body:
With @juliasloan25, we are restructuring the ocean-sea ice fluxes computation so that we can reuse the ClimaOcean function without necessarily needing to build out an `OceanSeaIceModel` from climaocean for use in `ClimaCoupler`. 
In this way, we can call 

```julia
compute_sea_ice_ocean_fluxes!(sea_ice_ocean_fluxes, ocean, sea_ice, melting_speed, ocean_properties)
```

from ClimaCoupler by passing the correct input, and the coupled simulation will compute the ocean-seaice interfacial fluxes.
title: Restructure sea ice ocean fluxes

body: Adding functionality and interface to initialize and force BGC `ClimaOcean` simulations using ECCO-Darwin fields

labels.description: We must feed the models so they don't get cranky
labels.name: data wrangling

title: Read ECCO-Darwin field from NASA Earthdata for initial conditions and restoring
